'''ây-l-n-v''' ('''kayalnevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hob|hob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hob|hob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-l-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayalnevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyalnevoko|thiyalnevoko]] || [[word:jiyalnevoko|jiyalnevoko]] || [[word:shiyalnevoko|shiyalnevoko]] || [[word:kiyalnevoko|kiyalnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyalnevoko|thuthuyalnevoko]] || [[word:jujuyalnevoko|jujuyalnevoko]] || [[word:shushuyalnevoko|shushuyalnevoko]] || [[word:kukuyalnevoko|kukuyalnevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyalnevoko|thuyalnevoko]] || [[word:juyalnevoko|juyalnevoko]] || [[word:shuyalnevoko|shuyalnevoko]] || [[word:kuyalnevoko|kuyalnevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyalnevoko|thoyalnevoko]] || [[word:joyalnevoko|joyalnevoko]] || [[word:shoyalnevoko|shoyalnevoko]] || [[word:koyalnevoko|koyalnevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyalnevoko|thĂŠyalnevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyalnevoko|jĂŠyalnevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyalnevoko|shĂŠyalnevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyalnevoko|kĂŠyalnevoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayalnevoko|thayalnevoko]] || [[word:jayalnevoko|jayalnevoko]] || [[word:shayalnevoko|shayalnevoko]] || [[word:kayalnevoko|kayalnevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
